prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk poster in vertical 9:16 format showing a dynamic low-angle action shot of a futuristic female designer sprinting through a neon megacity at night, reaching one hand toward the camera with strong foreshortening. She has black with magenta and violet highlights hair streaming backward in the wind, a glossy black techwear jacket, fingerless metallic gloves, and reflective futuristic streetwear. The scene is drenched in electric purple, magenta, blue, and white light, with wet streets, motion trails, glowing skyscraper signs, holographic billboards, and dense urban depth. Place a large centered headline overlay reading O FIM DO DESIGNER? in bold luminous typography, with the top line smaller and pink and the word below huge, white, and glowing, framed by subtle angular HUD lines and a small neon triangle beneath. Include 3 visible vertical billboards with text in the environment: one on the left reading "デザインの未来", one mid-right showing a portrait-style ad, and one far-right reading "未来を創るのは人か、AIか?". Make the composition highly energetic, glossy, and dramatic, like a premium AI-and-design debate poster for social media, with intense rim lighting, reflections, speed streaks, and a polished sci-fi editorial look.
